summary: Vertical selfie-style video of the DHS Secretary, a bearded man in a white dress shirt and tie, speaking to camera in an office with tall arched windows and dark upholstered chairs. Burned-in caption subtitles appear (for example 'PEOPLE WATCHED FOOTBALL'). The audio is him introducing the head of a White House task force on FIFA and describing DHS work to secure U.S.-based matches. A second person is mentioned in the tweet.

script.scene: Bearded man in white shirt and tie speaks to camera in an office with tall arched windows; caption 'PEOPLE WATCHED FOOTBALL.'
